# Client Requirement

Objetivo: improve operations visibility for support leads.

Usuarios: support leads and operations analysts.

Alcance: show daily case volume, aging, and SLA breach risk. Out of scope: billing and workforce scheduling.

Criterio de success: users can identify high-risk queues before daily standup.

Quality: QA should validate happy path, missing data, and stale data cases.

Metric source: baseline from current weekly operations report.
